categories.note: City of Las Vegas ArcGIS Hub (live). County/Henderson/NLV permits are residential-capture (Accela). Geocode yield 77.6% (6368/8206 APNs).
Parcel base + live Assessor enrichment of the top leads (owner/value/sale).
Mailing geo on 25.5% of leads · 809 LLC (9.9%), 381 trust, 311 out-of-state owners. Owner mailing is intelligence, never a map coordinate.
311 of 2093 owned leads (14.9%) are imported capital from 38 states; $9,577,463 tracked. Origin→metro flows mapped.
Derived from live permit pullers. NSCB bulk license sync is the next wave.
Clark County Recorder (deeds/NOD/trustee/liens). Manual/residential capture — pending ingestion.
Metro/LVMPD incident feeds — catalogued, not yet ingested.
Nevada SOS (SilverFlume/ORION) LLC registrations + officer graph — sanctioned bulk pull is the next wave.
Service-connect / new-meter signals — catalogued, not yet ingested.
Planning applications / land entitlements — catalogued, not yet ingested.
Zone changes / variances — catalogued, not yet ingested.
Public works, capital projects, bid awards — catalogued, not yet ingested.
Append-only event store + warehouse ledger — history is never overwritten.
Per-record first_seen/last_seen history; records are never deleted, only marked dormant.
Transparent weighted scoring — every score ships its signals[] (no black box).
Universal namespaced tags on every lead, derived from real fields.
Map + playback + lead detail + contractor board + coverage dashboards.

sonv_coverage.note: Counts are real harvested identifications. The true parcel universe per jurisdiction (assessor roll denominator) is not yet ingested, so coverage % is reported against measurable fields (owners identified, mapped) rather than an invented total.

flags.flag: unmappable permit (no APN and no coordinate)

denominators.note: BREADTH (parcels held) is limited by our own cap — the free parcel layer carries address+owner+mailing+land-use for the whole ~900k-parcel valley. DEPTH (value/sqft/beds/year) is limited by DATA ACCESS: those fields are sold by the Assessor as paid bulk extracts (AOEXTRACT/AORES) and are not in any free public API. Universes are approximate published references, never invented.

breadth.universe_source: Clark County Assessor secured roll (approx; ~870k-960k parcels)
breadth.basis: BREADTH — bounded by our cap, not the data (free layer covers the valley)

breadth.universe_source: U.S. Census Building Permits Survey, Clark County new-residential units/yr (~16k in 2021)
breadth.basis: PARTIAL reference — Census counts new-residential only; all-permit-types universe is not published

coverage_reality.headline: GRIT now captures essentially everything the FREE public data exposes for the parcels it holds. Remaining gaps are gated by paid or non-API sources, not by GRIT.

breadth_ceiling.limit: self-imposed cap (CARDS_MAX). The free parcel layer carries address+owner+mailing+land-use for the whole valley.
breadth_ceiling.note: Raising the cap adds address+owner pins for free, but ~900k parcels cannot render as individual pins on a static site — needs slim records or vector tiles past ~10-15k.

depth_ceiling.limit: value / sqft / beds / baths / year are NOT in any free public API. Clark County sells them as the AOEXTRACT (ownership+value) and AORES (sqft/beds/baths) bulk extracts (signed letter + subscription). The free GIS layer has owner+mailing+land-use only.

paths.what: Capture ALL permits/sales/distress across jurisdictions and enrich the parcels behind them; map shows active leads, coverage measured vs universe.
paths.gets: full SIGNAL coverage; address+owner breadth; no value/sqft depth

paths.what: Subscribe to AOEXTRACT + AORES weekly bulk files for parcel-level value/sqft/beds across all ~900k parcels.
paths.cost: Assessor subscription fee + bigger data store (off static-JSON)

paths.what: Turnkey nationwide parcel + permit + value data via API.

free_signal_wins: City of Las Vegas permits — already live (ArcGIS Hub open data).
LVMPD crime open data portal — free, ready to wire (opendata-lvmpd.hub.arcgis.com).
More parcel breadth (raise cap) — free address+owner across the valley.
